name: Association of Southeast Asian Nations
climate: Tropical equatorial and monsoon, hot and humid year-round with distinct wet and dry seasons in mainland Southeast Asia

neighbors.name: South China Sea
neighbors.relevance: Core maritime space for ASEAN members; territorial disputes with China shape defense and trade policy

neighbors.name: Strait of Malacca
neighbors.relevance: Primary shipping chokepoint for ASEAN trade; Malaysia, Singapore, and Indonesia are littoral states

neighbors.name: Indo-Pacific
neighbors.relevance: ASEAN centrality is a key pillar of Indo-Pacific strategy for all major powers

neighbors.name: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership
neighbors.relevance: ASEAN-led mega trade agreement integrating ASEAN with major Asian economies

neighbors.name: Belt and Road Initiative
neighbors.relevance: Major recipient of BRI infrastructure investment in ports, rail, and industrial zones

links.description: ASEAN initiated and hosts RCEP, the world's largest free trade agreement
Multiple ASEAN members contest China's nine-dash line claims
Critical energy and goods transit route connecting ASEAN to global markets
ASEAN is a focal point of Quad engagement and Indo-Pacific strategy
Several ASEAN members (BRN, MYS, SGP, VNM) are CPTPP signatories
BRI infrastructure financing in ASEAN creates economic ties and debt exposure to China
ASEAN sits at the geographic and strategic center of the Indo-Pacific framework
